hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "try{const i=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');console.log(JSON.parse(i).file_path||'')}catch(e){}" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '^\.env$|\.env\.'; then echo 'Blocked: .env edits require explicit user confirmation'; exit 2; fi

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "try{const i=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8');console.log(JSON.parse(i).file_path||'')}catch(e){}" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json)$'; then pnpm prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
